### How to Inherit & Update an Existing Mail Template in Odoo 19
This guide explains how to inherit and update existing mail templates in Odoo 19 using XML records. Customize email subjects, recipients, and content while preserving upgrade compatibility and avoiding direct modifications to core modules.
Source: https://www.cybrosys.com/blog/how-to-inherit-and-update-an-existing-mail-template-in-odoo-19

### What’s New in Odoo 19.2? Features That Make ERP Even Smarter
The latest update of Odoo — Version 19.2 — may not be a major version release, but it delivers a powerful set of improvements across multiple apps including CRM, Inventory, Manufacturing, Website, and AI.

### What to expect from Odoo 19? | much. Consulting
Rental: Odoo 19 will allow you to set default rental times, sync with work calendars, define pricelist rules, and manage transfers more efficiently. Loyalty: Odoo 19 will introduce fixed-price and discount-based rewards, support tiered discounts like "50% on 2nd and 4th cheapest...
Source: https://muchconsulting.com/blog/odoo-2/what-to-expect-from-odoo-19-new-feature-updates-63

### GitHub - odoo/odoo: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.
Odoo Apps can be used as stand-alone applications, but they also integrate seamlessly so you get a full-featured Open Source ERP when you install several Apps. Getting started with Odoo. For a standard installation please follow the Setup instructions from the documentation.
